compiled_state.title: Remove issue_tracker.create_cmd lines from test-read-config.sh and test-flat-config-e2e.sh
compiled_state.author: Joe Oakhart

comments.body: Remove issue_tracker.create_cmd test lines. (1) test-read-config.sh: remove test_schema_validates_issue_tracker_section that asserts schema has create_cmd property (lines 175-191); remove issue_tracker.create_cmd=tk create from NESTED_FIXTURE (line 216); keep search_cmd test (test_read_config_nested_issue_tracker_search_cmd). (2) test-flat-config-e2e.sh: remove issue_tracker.create_cmd=tk create from fixture at line 49. Depends on T9 guard (e648-3cf2).
comments.author: Joe Oakhart
